productDisplayName: Little Miss Women Printed Pink Tshirt
description: Composition Fuchsia pink T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and rubber with flock print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Mashine wash inside out with similar colours in warm water Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on decorations Get dressed to suit your naughty mood with this parrot green T-shirt from little miss. The rubber and flock print adds to your naughty mood, while the cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Pair it with jeans and sneakers.
